method_1_bound_state_sum.verdict: Monotonic, asymptotes to ~81.25% of analytic value; continuum gap ~18.75% structural

method_2_sturmian_basis.description: Dalgarno-Lewis equation (H - E_1S) F|1s> = z|1s>, solved on l=1 Coulomb Sturmian basis at k=Z
method_2_sturmian_basis.verdict: EXACT at n_max=3 (N_basis=2). All higher Sturmians have c_n = 0 to numerical precision.
method_2_sturmian_basis.structural_explanation: F|1s> = -(1/2)*z*(r+2)|1s>, p-wave radial part (r^2 + 2r) e^{-r}, lies exactly in span{S_2^p, S_3^p}

projection_chain.introduces: angular factor 1/sqrt(3) for z = r cos theta = sqrt(4pi/3) r Y_1^0

projection_chain.transcendental: rational; closes bound+continuum sum exactly at finite N

focal_length_formula.transcendental_class: rational (no pi, no zeta, no calibration content)

verdict.graph_native_n_max_truncated: Bound-state-only sum reaches ~81% of analytic at n_max=15; convergence to 81.25% structural floor; continuum is structurally inaccessible without Sturmian projection.
verdict.sturmian_projection: Reaches 9/2 EXACTLY at finite N_basis=2 (n_max=3). The p-wave Sturmian basis at k=Z spans the Dalgarno-Lewis solution F|1s> in 2-dim subspace.
verdict.class_D_gap: NO -- the bound-state-only finite-truncation gap is closed structurally by the Sturmian projection (Paper 34 sec III.5). This is a single-projection two-projection match, not a Class D structural floor.
verdict.match_precision: machine-precision exact at N_basis=2 in Sturmian basis

catalog_row_draft.match: H 1S static dipole polarizability alpha_p = 9/2 a_0^3 (Z=1)
catalog_row_draft.projections: Fock o Wigner 3j o Sturmian reparameterization
